name: sabercomprar
description: A collaborative platform designed for the smart management and reporting of supermarket shopping lists.

scripts.api:build-dev: pnpm run --filter 'sabercomprar-api' build && pnpm run --filter 'sabercomprar-api' dev
scripts.api:local-db: pnpm run --filter 'sabercomprar-api' drizzle:push && pnpm run --filter 'sabercomprar-api' drizzle:records

author: caroWD
